projectDescription: Modern, responsive redesign of the institutional website for Institución Educativa Municipal Emilio Cifuentes, built with vanilla HTML5 and CSS3.
keyFeatures: Fully responsive layout supporting mobile, tablet, and desktop breakpoints
Modern hero section with institutional branding and quick-access cards
News section with categorized article cards (Logro Emilista, Evento Institucional, Comunidad Emilista)
Dedicated pages: Home, Nosotros, Noticias, Recursos, Contacto
CSS custom properties (design tokens) for consistent color and typography
Flexbox and CSS Grid layouts throughout
Shared header/footer pattern across all pages
Institutional document downloads (circulares, manual de convivencia, formato de excusa)
Open Graph and Twitter Card meta tags for social sharing
Defined commit convention and Better Comments annotation standard
publicApiSurface: index.html — Home page (hero, quick-access, news, institutional summary)
pages/recursos.html — Academic resources and document downloads
css/styles.css — Global styles and shared design tokens
